name: Airship (Actions)
description: Send events from Segment to Airship for message triggering, audience targeting, personalization, and analytics.

access_token.label: Access Token
access_token.description: Create in the Airship Go dashboard in Settings->Partner Integrations->Segment

app_key.label: App Key
app_key.description: The App Key identifies the Airship Project to which API requests are made.

named_user_id.label: Airship Named User ID
named_user_id.description: The identifier assigned in Airship as the Named User

enable_batching.label: Batch Data to Airship
enable_batching.description: If true, Segment will batch events before sending to Airship. Limit 100 events per request.

setAttributes.title: Set Attributes
setAttributes.description: Set user attributes in Airship with data from Segment. Some common user attributes are predefined in the attributes field, however note that all must be created in Airship before use. More information here: https://docs.airship.com/guides/messaging/user-guide/audience/segmentation/attributes/project/#adding-attributes

named_user_id.label: Airship Named User ID
named_user_id.description: The identifier assigned in Airship as the Named User

attributes.label: Attributes
attributes.description: User Attributes. Attributes should exist in Airship in order to be set, including the predifined ones defaulted here.

manageTags.title: Manage Tags
manageTags.description: Associate tags with users in your audience for segmentation and automation

named_user_id.label: Airship Named User ID
named_user_id.description: The identifier assigned in Airship as the Named User

tags.label: Tag Name
tags.description: Tag name to add or remove. Values for each tag should be boolean only. A true value creates a tag, a false value removes a tag. Non-boolean values will be ignored.

tag_group.label: Tag Group
tag_group.description: The Tag Group to sync your tags to. This defaults to`segment-integration` but can be overridden with this field. Note: the Tag Group used must be valid and exist in Airship.

registerAndAssociate.title: Register And Associate
registerAndAssociate.description: Register an Email address or SMS number and associate it with a Named User ID.

sms_sender.label: SMS Sender
sms_sender.description: A long or short code the app is configured to send from (if using for SMS).

named_user_id.label: Airship Named User ID
named_user_id.description: The identifier assigned in Airship as the Named User

address.label: Email Address or MSISDN
address.description: Email address or mobile number to register (required)

new_address.label: New Email Address
new_address.description: Email address to replace old one

commercial_opted_in.label: Commercial Opted In Date-Time
commercial_opted_in.description: The date-time when a user gave explicit permission to receive commercial emails

commercial_opted_out.label: Commercial Opted Out Date-Time
commercial_opted_out.description: The date-time when a user explicitly denied permission to receive commercial emails.

click_tracking_opted_in.label: Click Tracking Opted in Date-Time
click_tracking_opted_in.description: The date-time when a user opted in to click tracking.

click_tracking_opted_out.label: Click Tracking Opted out Date-Time
click_tracking_opted_out.description: The date-time when a user opted out of click tracking.

open_tracking_opted_in.label: Open Tracking Opted in Date-Time
open_tracking_opted_in.description: The date-time when a user opted in to open tracking.

open_tracking_opted_out.label: Open Tracking Opted out Date-Time
open_tracking_opted_out.description: The date-time when a user opted out of open tracking.

transactional_opted_in.label: Transactional Email Opt In Date-Time
transactional_opted_in.description: The date-time when a user gave explicit permission to receive transactional emails. Users do not need to opt-in to receive transactional emails unless they have previously opted out.

transactional_opted_out.label: Transactional Email Opt Out Date-Time
transactional_opted_out.description: The date-time when a user explicitly denied permission to receive transactional emails.

suppression_state.label: Suppression State
suppression_state.description: If an email channel is suppressed, the reason for its suppression. Email channels with any suppression state set will not have any delivery to them fulfilled. If a more specific reason is not known, use imported. Possible values: spam_complaint, bounce, imported

sms_opted_in.label: SMS Opt In Date-Time
sms_opted_in.description: The date-time when a user gave explicit permission to receive SMS messages.
